mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification (user_id, category, title, body, read_flag) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{body}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification SET read_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_notification SET read_flag = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0
